Metadata.title: Photocopy Center Ilioupoli | Photocopies, Printing, Blueprints
Metadata.description: 25 years of experience in photocopies, printing, engineering blueprints, and office services in Ilioupoli, Athens.

Hero.headline: Photocopy Center Ilioupoli
Hero.subheadline: 25 years by your side — Photocopies, Printing, Services

About.title: About Us
About.description: With over 25 years of experience, Photocopy Center Ilioupoli is your trusted solution for photocopies, printing, and office services. We serve professionals, students, and individuals with speed, quality, and affordable prices.
About.card1Desc: Trust decades of expertise in the printing and photocopying industry.
About.card2Desc: Modern machines for excellent results on every job.
About.card3Desc: Immediate order fulfillment, even for large volumes.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Complete printing and office solutions
Services.blueprintsDesc: Large format printing of architectural and engineering drawings (A2, A1, A0). Ideal for architects, engineers, and students.
Services.photocopiesDesc: Black & white and color photocopies in A4 and A3 formats.
Services.digitalPrintingDesc: High quality digital prints for every need.
Services.bindingDesc: Spiral and thermal binding for projects and presentations.
Services.laminatingDesc: Document lamination for protection and a professional look.
Services.usbPrintingDesc: Bring your files on USB or send them via email for instant printing.
Services.businessCardsDesc: Design and printing of professional business cards.
Services.stationeryDesc: Wide variety of stationery and office supplies.

BlueprintsPage.metaDescription: Printing, reproduction and digitization of topographic & architectural blueprints in large format. A0, A1, A2, A3.
BlueprintsPage.title: Topographic & Architectural Blueprint Printing
BlueprintsPage.subtitle: Color and black & white large format services for professionals and students
BlueprintsPage.ctaDesc: Contact us or bring your files directly to our shop.
BlueprintsPage.digitalPrintingDesc: We print your drawings directly from digital files — color or black & white. We accept files via USB, external drive, or email in PDF, TIFF, JPG, and PNG formats. Available sizes from A3 to A0, as well as widths up to 90cm with unlimited length.
BlueprintsPage.photocopyingDesc: We reproduce existing printed drawings — color or black & white. The original drawing is scanned and printed on professional large format printers. Sizes from A3 to A0, with widths up to 90cm and unlimited length.
BlueprintsPage.scanningDesc: We scan your drawings in high resolution — black & white or color — and save them as PDF, TIFF, JPG, or PNG. Delivery via USB or email. Sizes from A3 to A0, widths up to 90cm with unlimited length.
BlueprintsPage.paperDesc: For color printing we use 100gr roll paper (plotter). For black & white, 80gr xerographic roll paper.
BlueprintsPage.foldingDesc: After printing, drawings pass through a specialized folding machine for easy filing and transport.
BlueprintsPage.extrasDesc: Filing folders with elastic bands, sorting and grouping of drawings upon request.

PhotocopiesPage.metaDescription: Black & white and color photocopies, file printing from PDF/Word/Excel, via USB and email. A3, A4, A5.
PhotocopiesPage.title: Photocopies & Printing
PhotocopiesPage.subtitle: Black & white and color, in every size, with professional results
PhotocopiesPage.ctaDesc: Bring your files or send them via email — we prepare them instantly.
PhotocopiesPage.bwDesc: Photocopies in A3, A4, and A5 sizes with shrink and enlarge options. Automatic stapling for large volumes.
PhotocopiesPage.colorDesc: Color photocopies in A3, A4, and A5 with shrink and enlarge options. Automatic stapling. Choice of paper: standard, velvet, illustration, or cardstock up to 300gr.
PhotocopiesPage.filePrintingDesc: We print from all popular file formats: PDF (recommended), Word, Excel, PowerPoint, as well as EPS, CDR, and PSD.
PhotocopiesPage.mediaPrintingDesc: Bring your files on USB or send them via email and Viber. We prepare them quickly and reliably.

ScanningPage.metaDescription: Document and blueprint digitization to PDF, TIFF, JPG, PNG. From A5 to A0 and custom sizes. Same-day delivery.
ScanningPage.title: Document Scanning & Digitization
ScanningPage.subtitle: Convert your printed documents to digital files — fast, secure, and in high resolution
ScanningPage.ctaDesc: Bring them to our shop or contact us for large-scale projects.
ScanningPage.expertiseDesc: Modern equipment and years of experience ensure safe, high-quality digitization of every document.
ScanningPage.archivingDesc: We handle digital sorting and grouping of your files into folders — by type, batch, binder, or any structure you need.
ScanningPage.storageDesc: Files are preferably saved as PDF for maximum security. Alternatively, we deliver in TIFF, JPG, or PNG depending on your needs.
ScanningPage.turnaroundDesc: Most jobs are completed same-day. For mixed batches (stapled, transparencies, clips, etc.), delivery time is arranged upon consultation.
ScanningPage.boundDocsDesc: For bound material (books, volumes, theses), delivery time is determined after evaluation. Scanning is done with special care to preserve the original.

DigitalPrintingPage.metaDescription: High quality digital prints on laser printers. Black & white, color, large batches, specialty papers.
DigitalPrintingPage.title: Digital Printing
DigitalPrintingPage.subtitle: High quality prints for every need — fast and affordable
DigitalPrintingPage.ctaDesc: Bring your files or send them via email — we prepare them instantly.
DigitalPrintingPage.laserPrintingDesc: Black & white and color prints on professional laser printers with top clarity and speed.
DigitalPrintingPage.colorPrintingDesc: Vivid colors and faithful reproduction for brochures, presentations, posters, and every color print.
DigitalPrintingPage.largeBatchesDesc: We handle large quantity printing with competitive prices and fast turnaround times.
DigitalPrintingPage.specialPaperDesc: Printing on velvet, illustration, 300gr cardstock, and other specialty papers for professional results.

BindingPage.metaDescription: Spiral, thermal and specialty binding for theses, corporate documents and presentations.
BindingPage.title: Binding
BindingPage.subtitle: Spiral, thermal, and specialty binding for every project
BindingPage.ctaDesc: Bring your documents and we prepare them on the spot.
BindingPage.spiralBindingDesc: Plastic or metal spiral in a variety of colors and sizes. Ideal for notes, projects, and presentations that need easy 360° opening.
BindingPage.thermalBindingDesc: Professional thermal binding for a clean, book-like result. Suitable for theses, reports, and corporate documents.
BindingPage.thesisBindingDesc: Specialized binding for academic work according to each university's requirements. Hard cover, gold stamping, and premium finish.
BindingPage.customBindingDesc: Tailored binding solutions for special needs — restaurant menus, product catalogs, planners, and presentation folders.

UsbPrintingPage.metaTitle: Print from USB & Email | Photocopy Center Ilioupoli
UsbPrintingPage.metaDescription: File printing from USB, email or Viber. Support for PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, JPG, PNG. Instant service.
UsbPrintingPage.title: Print from USB & Email
UsbPrintingPage.subtitle: Send or bring your files — we prepare them instantly
UsbPrintingPage.ctaDesc: Send them via email or bring them on USB — we prepare them instantly.
UsbPrintingPage.usbDesc: Bring your files on USB stick, SD card, or external drive. We print them immediately in black & white or color.
UsbPrintingPage.emailDesc: Send your files to our email and come pick them up ready. Service within minutes.
UsbPrintingPage.viberDesc: Send photos or documents via Viber for quick printing. Ideal when you don't have a USB nearby.

BusinessCardsPage.metaDescription: Design and printing of professional business cards. High quality digital printing, lamination, specialty finishes.
BusinessCardsPage.title: Business Cards
BusinessCardsPage.subtitle: Design and printing of cards that make an impression
BusinessCardsPage.ctaDesc: Bring your design or let us create one for you.
BusinessCardsPage.designDesc: We create a unique design for your card that reflects your professional identity. Customized to every detail.
BusinessCardsPage.printingDesc: High resolution digital printing on quality paper. Small or large quantities with fast turnaround times.
BusinessCardsPage.finishesDesc: Glossy or matte lamination, rounded corners, specialty papers. Every detail counts for a card that stands out.

LaminatingPage.metaDescription: Document laminating in glossy, matte and heavy-duty finishes. Sizes A3 to A5. On-the-spot service.
LaminatingPage.title: Document Laminating
LaminatingPage.subtitle: Protection and professional appearance for every document
LaminatingPage.ctaDesc: Bring your documents and we prepare them on the spot.
LaminatingPage.glossyDesc: Shiny finish that enhances colors and images. Ideal for photos, posters, and promotional material.
LaminatingPage.matteDesc: Elegant, anti-glare finish without reflections. Suitable for documents that need to be easily readable.
LaminatingPage.heavyDutyDesc: Thick film for maximum protection and durability. Ideal for menus, cards, signs, and daily-use material.

StationeryPage.metaTitle: Stationery & Office Supplies | Photocopy Center Ilioupoli
StationeryPage.metaDescription: Wide variety of stationery and office supplies at affordable prices. Office supplies, school supplies, ink and paper.
StationeryPage.title: Stationery & Office Supplies
StationeryPage.subtitle: Wide variety of stationery and office supplies at affordable prices
StationeryPage.ctaDesc: Visit our shop and find everything you need.
StationeryPage.officeSuppliesDesc: Pens, markers, folders, binders, clips, scissors, glue, and every essential office supply.
StationeryPage.schoolSuppliesDesc: Notebooks, pads, erasers, sharpeners, colors, pencils, and everything a student needs.
StationeryPage.inkTonerDesc: Genuine and compatible ink and toner for the most popular printers. Ask us for the right type for your printer.
StationeryPage.paperDesc: A4/A3 printing paper, photocopying paper, specialty presentation papers, mailing envelopes, and much more.

QuoteDialog.title: Request a Quote
QuoteDialog.description: Describe what you need and we'll get back to you right away.
QuoteDialog.messagePlaceholder: Describe what you need (e.g. 100 B&W A4 photocopies, thesis binding...)

users.description: Manage your team members and their permissions.

settings.description: Manage your application preferences and configuration.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Track and manage your organization's expenses.
